# perceptdot

> Give your AI eyes. visual_check() catches layout bugs before users do.

perceptdot is an AI Visual QA platform for CI/CD pipelines and MCP-compatible AI tools. It takes headless screenshots via Cloudflare Browser Rendering and analyzes them with Gemini 2.5 Flash vision AI — returning structured bug reports with severity levels (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), affected elements, and suggested fixes.

## Core Product: @perceptdot/eye

- `visual_check(url)` → headless screenshot + AI analysis in ~7 seconds
- `visual_diff(url_a, url_b)` → before/after deploy comparison (coming soon)
- Fully headless — no desktop, no GUI, runs in CI/CD
- Cost: $0.000012 per check

## Installation

MCP (Claude Code):
```
claude mcp add --transport http perceptdot https://mcp.perceptdot.com/mcp
```

GitHub Action:
```yaml
- uses: perceptdot/visual-check-action@v1
  with:
    url: ${{ env.PREVIEW_URL }}
    api-key: ${{ secrets.PERCEPTDOT_API_KEY }}
```

REST API:
```
POST https://api.perceptdot.com/v1/eye/check
Header: X-Percept-Key: YOUR_KEY
Body: {"url": "https://example.com"}
```

## Also Available: MCP Service Servers

- @perceptdot/ga4 — Google Analytics 4 realtime data
- @perceptdot/vercel — Vercel deployment status
- @perceptdot/github — GitHub PRs, issues, CI status
- @perceptdot/sentry — Sentry error monitoring

## Pricing

- Free: 100 checks/month, no credit card
- Pro: $19/month, 10,000 checks
- Unlimited: $49/month, unlimited checks

## Technical Details

- Screenshots: Cloudflare Browser Rendering API (headless Chromium)
- AI Analysis: Gemini 2.5 Flash (vision model)
- Backend: TypeScript + Hono on Cloudflare Workers
- MCP Protocol: Anthropic MCP standard, streamable HTTP transport
- Privacy: screenshots captured, analyzed, discarded — nothing stored

- Website: https://perceptdot.com
